#### Summary
 **[[inverse-folding|Inverse folding]] models trained on all proteins (including proteins from mesophiles) generate sequences that are as [[thermostability|thermostable]] as those generated by models trained only on proteins from thermophiles** ([@ertelt2024]; $n=1$ warning). However, the sequence composition of the designs changes. This was observed using a custom-trained version of [[ProteinMPNN]].

#### See also
* [[Thermophilic proteins have more aliphatic and charged residues on surface than mesophilic proteins]]
